ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_assessment: High – text-based PDF with clear structure and readable fields
certificate.notes: Page 1 is the certificate itself. Page 2 is a copy of the commercial invoice embedded within the certificate file (not used for verification per rule 8.5.0).

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_assessment: High – text-based PDF with clear structure and readable fields
invoice.notes: Single-page commercial invoice from Th. Brunius & Co AB. This is the separate invoice file used for verification.

document_pairing.notes: Certificate file (Document A) contains certificate on page 1 and an embedded invoice copy on page 2. Per rule 8.5.0, verification is performed against the separate invoice file (Document B). The invoice in Document B matches the embedded invoice in Document A page 2 — both are Invoice No. 501896 from Th. Brunius & Co AB.

criteria_met: Consignor 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' identified as invoice issuer 'Th. Brunius & Co AB' in Document B
Consignee 'Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton' matches 'SOLD TO' in Document B
Country of Origin 'Slovakia' matches in both documents

locations_found: Document B, page 1: header/branding 'Th. Brunius & Co AB' (company name at top of invoice)
Document B, page 1: VAT NO line 'Th. Brunius & Co AB'
Document B, page 1: footer 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' in certification block

lc_verification.notes: No LC reference found in the certificate. No 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' field or label identified.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Th.Brunius & Co AB, PO Box 2516, SE-403 17, Gothenburg, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Th. Brunius & Co AB, PO Box 2516, SE-403 17 Gothenburg, Sweden (VAT NO: SE556011055201)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' anywhere in the invoice file.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND – 'Th. Brunius & Co AB' identified in invoice header, company info block, and footer certification block. After normalization (spaces around period), names are identical.

comparison_steps.description: Compare consignor company name with invoice issuer name.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Th.Brunius & Co AB'. Invoice: 'Th. Brunius & Co AB'. Difference is only a space after 'Th.' — normalization of extra whitespace/punctuation permitted. Same juridical party.
Invoice explicitly states 'Sweden' in the address block. Additionally, VAT NO prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Country in certificate: Sweden. Country in invoice: Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found in invoice header/company info
Name verified as same juridical party after whitespace normalization
Country verified via explicit address and VAT prefix SE

checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' identifieras som fakturautställaren 'Th. Brunius & Co AB' i fakturans sidhuvud, adressblock och footer. Skillnaden är enbart ett extra mellanslag efter 'Th.' — tillåten normalisering. Landet Sverige bekräftas explicit i fakturans adress ('Sweden') och via VAT-prefix 'SE'. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor raw: 'Th.Brunius & Co AB'. Invoice issuer raw: 'Th. Brunius & Co AB'. Only difference: space after period in 'Th.' — permitted normalization per section 4. Address: PO Box 2516, SE-403 17 Gothenburg matches exactly. Country: both Sweden. VAT: SE556011055201 confirms SE=Sweden. Rule 4.1.0 confirms name found in invoice. Rule 4.1.4 confirms country match.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton, P.O.Box 51, 11351 Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
checkpoints.invoice_value: SOLD TO: Al-Medan Project Company for Corrugated Carton, P.O.Box 51, 11351 Riyadh, Saudi Arabia / CONSIGNED TO: Al-Medan Project Company for Corrugated Carton, P.O.Box 51, 11351 Riyadh, Saudi Arabia

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has 'SOLD TO' field with 'Al-Medan Project Company for Corrugated Carton'. This is the primary billing field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare consignee name from certificate with SOLD TO in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton'. Invoice SOLD TO: 'Al-Medan Project Company for Corrugated Carton'. Difference is only capitalization of 'For' vs 'for' — permitted normalization. Same juridical party.
Certificate: 'Saudi Arabia'. Invoice SOLD TO: 'Saudi Arabia'. Exact match.
Certificate: 'P.O.Box 51, 11351 Riyadh'. Invoice: 'P.O.Box 51, 11351 Riyadh'. Exact match. Also confirmed in CONSIGNED TO field.

rules_applied.description: SOLD TO identified as primary billing field

checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton' identifieras i fakturans SOLD TO-fält som 'Al-Medan Project Company for Corrugated Carton'. Skillnaden avser enbart versaler/gemener ('For' vs 'for') — tillåten normalisering. Adress (P.O.Box 51, 11351 Riyadh) och land (Saudi Arabia) överensstämmer exakt. Samma part bekräftas även i CONSIGNED TO-fältet. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton, P.O.Box 51, 11351 Riyadh, Saudi Arabia'. Invoice SOLD TO: 'Al-Medan Project Company for Corrugated Carton, P.O.Box 51, 11351 Riyadh, Saudi Arabia'. Only difference: 'For' vs 'for' — case normalization allowed per section 4. Country: exact match 'Saudi Arabia'. Additionally confirmed in CONSIGNED TO field with identical details.

checkpoints.certificate_value: 82 reels of White Top Testliner, H.S. Code No.: 48052400
checkpoints.invoice_value: WHITE TOP TESTLINER (6 line items), Total Unit Count: 82 Reels, H.S. Code No.: 48052400

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers for Priority 1 matching.
comparison_steps.result: No specific article numbers in certificate. Certificate uses product description and HS code. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate and match against invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate main designation: 'White Top Testliner'. Invoice: 'WHITE TOP TESTLINER' appears in all 6 line items. After case normalization: exact match. HS Code '48052400' matches exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Check for additions that do not change product identity.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: '82 reels of White Top Testliner'. Invoice: 6 line items each described as 'Reels: WHITE TOP TESTLINER' with specification details (Subs, RW, DIA, Core). The specifications are non-identity-bearing additions. Total Unit Count: 82 Reels confirms the 82 reels count.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'White Top Testliner' identified in invoice after case normalization
Specification details (gsm, RW, DIA, Core) treated as non-identity-bearing additions

checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'White Top Testliner' identifieras exakt i fakturans samtliga artikelrader som 'WHITE TOP TESTLINER' efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. HS-koden 48052400 överensstämmer exakt. Fakturans specifikationsdetaljer (gsm, RW, DIA, Core) är icke-identitetsbärande tillägg som inte påverkar matchningen. Antal (82 reels) bekräftas av fakturans 'Total Unit Count: 82 Reels'. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: '82 reels of White Top Testliner, H.S. Code No.: 48052400'. Invoice: 6 lines all 'WHITE TOP TESTLINER' with varying specs. Main designation 'White Top Testliner' → 'WHITE TOP TESTLINER' = case normalization only. HS code 48052400 exact match. 82 reels = Total Unit Count 82 Reels. No article numbers present → Priority 2 text matching applied. Result: MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Determine the verification-founding quantity from box 7.
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 value: '247.133 mt'. This is the quantity to verify. Unit: MT (metric ton). No GW/NW category explicitly stated.

comparison_steps.description: Search for the numerical value 247.133 in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice explicitly states 'Total Weight Quantity: 247.133 MT'. Exact numerical match: 247.133 = 247.133. Unit: MT = MT.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states '247.133 mt' without explicit GW/NW category. Apply rule 4.4.2.2.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate has ONE weight value without GW/NW category. Invoice states 'Total Weight Quantity: 247.133 MT' — also without GW/NW specification. No conflicting alternative weight value in invoice. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: single weight value, identifiable in invoice, no contradictory alternative → MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value '247.133 mt' used as verification-founding quantity
Occurrence check: 247.133 found in invoice total weight line
Single weight value without GW/NW, no contradictory alternative in invoice → MATCH

checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet '247.133 mt' (box 7) identifieras exakt i fakturans totallinje 'Total Weight Quantity: 247.133 MT'. Numeriskt värde (247.133) och enhet (MT) överensstämmer exakt. Certifikatet anger ett enda viktvärde utan GW/NW-kategori, och fakturan innehåller inget motstridigt alternativt viktvärde — villkoren i 4.4.2.2 punkt 2 uppfylls. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: '247.133 mt'. Invoice: 'Total Weight Quantity: 247.133 MT'. Exact match on numerical value and unit. No GW/NW stated in certificate — single weight value, confirmed by invoice with no contradictory alternative weight. No undantag needed. Direct occurrence check passes.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin field in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has explicit field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Slovakia'. Direct identification.
Certificate: 'Slovakia'. Invoice: 'Slovakia'. Exact match — no normalization needed.

comparison_steps.description: Confirm origin can be positively verified.
comparison_steps.result: Slovakia explicitly identified in invoice's dedicated COUNTRY OF ORIGIN field. Additional confirmation: invoice states 'goods are of Slovakian origin' in certification text, and shipping marks include 'Made in Slovakia'.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit COUNTRY OF ORIGIN field
Exact match: Slovakia = Slovakia, no normalization needed

checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Slovakia' (box 3) identifieras exakt i fakturans explicita fält 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Slovakia'. Ytterligare bekräftelse finns i fakturans certifieringstext ('goods are of Slovakian origin') och shipping marks ('Made in Slovakia'). MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'Slovakia'. Invoice COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: 'Slovakia'. Exact string match. Also confirmed by invoice text 'goods are of Slovakian origin' and shipping marks 'Made in Slovakia'. No normalization needed. Single origin country — no mixed origins complexity.

evidence.description: Issuer country and VAT in invoice
evidence.raw_text: SE-403 17 Gothenburg, Sweden; VAT NO: SE556011055201
Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton
Al-Medan Project Company for Corrugated Carton, P.O.Box 51, 11351 Riyadh, Saudi Arabia

H.S. Code No.: 48052400

evidence.description: HS Code and total unit count in invoice
evidence.raw_text: H.S. Code No.: 48052400; Total Unit Count: 82 Reels

rule_evaluation_log.result: NOT_APPLICABLE – No LC reference found in certificate
APPLIED – Certificate from Document A page 1, invoice from Document B page 1. Document A page 2 contains embedded invoice copy (not used for verification).
PASS – Consignor identified in invoice, consignee identified in invoice, country of origin matches.
APPLIED – 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' found as 'Th. Brunius & Co AB' in invoice header, company info block, and footer. MATCH.
MATCH – Same juridical party after whitespace normalization.
APPLIED – Country Sweden confirmed via explicit address and VAT prefix SE.
APPLIED – SOLD TO field identified as primary billing field.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Goods description – article number priority check
rule_evaluation_log.result: NOT_APPLICABLE – No article numbers in certificate. Proceed to Priority 2.
MATCH – 'White Top Testliner' identified in invoice as 'WHITE TOP TESTLINER' after case normalization.
APPLIED – Specification details (gsm, RW, DIA, Core) treated as non-identity-bearing.
APPLIED – Box 7 value '247.133 mt' used as verification-founding quantity.
MATCH – 247.133 found in invoice total weight line.
APPLIED – Single weight value without GW/NW, no contradictory alternative → MATCH per point 2.
MATCH – 'Slovakia' found in explicit COUNTRY OF ORIGIN field.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The invoice embedded in the certificate file (Document A, page 2) should be used for verification instead of the separate invoice file (Document B).
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 8.5.0, verification must be performed against the invoice in the separate invoice file (Document B), not against an embedded copy in the certificate file. Document A page 2 is supplementary material attached to the certificate.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The consignor name difference ('Th.Brunius' vs 'Th. Brunius') indicates different juridical parties.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The difference is only a space after the period in 'Th.' — this is permitted normalization of extra whitespace per section 4. All other identifying information (address, VAT, country) matches exactly.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The quantity '247.133 mt' should be classified as MANUAL_REVIEW because GW/NW category is not specified.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate has a single weight value without GW/NW category, invoice confirms the same numerical value with no contradictory alternative weight value → MATCH.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Th.Brunius & Co AB identifieras som fakturautställare, mottagaren Al-Medan Project Company for Corrugated Carton matchar fakturans köpare, varubeskrivningen White Top Testliner och kvantiteten 247.133 MT stämmer exakt, och ursprungslandet Slovakien bekräftas i fakturans ursprungsfält. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.notes: Certificate file contains an embedded copy of the invoice on page 2. Verification was performed against the separate invoice file (Document B) per rule 8.5.0. Both documents are text-based PDFs with high readability.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair_summary: Certifikat SEG-23D-787703 (utfärdat 2023-03-06) verifierat mot faktura 501896 (daterad 2023-03-02) från Th. Brunius & Co AB.

sections.certificate_value: Th.Brunius & Co AB, PO Box 2516, SE-403 17, Gothenburg, Sweden

sections.rule_applied: Konsignorns företagsnamn identifieras i fakturans sidhuvud efter normalisering av mellanslag. Landet Sverige bekräftas via explicit adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' identifieras exakt (efter mellanslagsnormalisering) som fakturautställaren 'Th. Brunius & Co AB'. Land: Sverige matchar. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Mottagaren identifieras i fakturans SOLD TO-fält efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Land och adress överensstämmer exakt.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton' matchar fakturans SOLD TO 'Al-Medan Project Company for Corrugated Carton' efter normalisering av 'For'/'for'. Land Saudi Arabia och adress matchar exakt. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: 82 reels of White Top Testliner, H.S. Code No.: 48052400
sections.invoice_value: WHITE TOP TESTLINER (6 rader), Total Unit Count: 82 Reels, H.S. Code No.: 48052400
sections.rule_applied: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'White Top Testliner' identifieras i fakturan efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. HS-kod matchar exakt. Antal 82 reels bekräftas.
sections.motivation: Produktnamnet 'White Top Testliner' matchas exakt mot fakturans 'WHITE TOP TESTLINER' efter versalnormalisering. HS-kod 48052400 och antal 82 reels matchar. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt förekomstkontroll: numeriskt värde 247.133 och enhet MT identifieras exakt i fakturans totalrad.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet 247.133 MT matchar exakt fakturans 'Total Weight Quantity: 247.133 MT'. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning av ursprungsland i fakturans explicita COUNTRY OF ORIGIN-fält.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Slovakia' matchar exakt fakturans 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Slovakia'. Ytterligare bekräftat av 'goods are of Slovakian origin'. MATCH.

human_readable_report.conclusion: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) visar MATCH. Dokumentparet uppfyller kraven för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints MATCH → comparison_result IDENTICAL → workflow AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. All confidence values ≥ 0.97, well above the 0.85 floor. No inconsistencies detected.
